response.original_title: A Legacy of Tradition: Fifty Years of Saint Thomas Aquinas Seminary
response.overview: This documentary chronicles the remarkable 50-year journey of Saint Thomas Aquinas Seminary, a cornerstone of the Society of Saint Pius X’s (SSPX) apostolate in the United States. Founded by Archbishop Marcel Lefebvre in 1973, the Seminary serves as the house of study for the formation of the SSPX’s priests.
response.title: A Legacy of Tradition: Fifty Years of Saint Thomas Aquinas Seminary
